---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new widget
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or widget.

**Which screens / layout**
The Times Gate has 5 independent 128×128 screens. How should this use them?

**Data source (if any)**
For data-driven widgets: where does the data come from, and does it need an API
key? (Keyless, CORS-open sources are easiest; keyed ones need a proxy or a
per-user key kept in the browser.)

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've already tried or ruled out.
